title: GridStatus ERCOT Solar Actual And Forecast By Geo Region Hourly
description:
Hourly solar report with forecasts as published by ERCOT.

This report is published each hour and includes System-wide and geographic regional hourly averaged solar power production, forecasts, and the High Sustainable Limit (HSL) of online resources in the Current Operating Plan (COP). HSL is ERCOT's forecast of uncurtailed power generation potential.

The STPPF and PVGRPP values are forecasts representing a 50% and 80% chance of exceedance respectively. These forecasts are produced for a rolling 168-hour future period with each hourly report.
